title: Task
description: A single task item in the to-do list

id.description: Unique identifier for the task (e.g. UUID or slug)

description.description: Full description of the task and what done looks like

project_id.description: ID of the related project (links to data/projects/)

estimated_minutes.description: Estimated time to complete the task in minutes

actual_minutes.description: Actual time taken once completed (null if not yet done)

completed_date.description: Date the task was completed (null if not yet done)

assigned_to.description: Name or email of person the task is assigned to (default: self)

depends_on.description: List of task IDs that must be completed before this task can start

blocks.description: List of task IDs that cannot start until this task is complete

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and grouping

notes.description: Any additional notes or context for the task

delay_reason.description: Reason for delay if status is delayed
